latin: Vir sapiens iuveni duas pilulas obtulit: 'si caeruleam sumis, hic somnus permanet. si rubram sumis, ostendam tibi quam alta fovea sit.'

questions.prompt: What do the two pills represent?
questions.target: A choice between comfortable ignorance and harsh truth
choices: A choice between comfortable ignorance and harsh truth

questions.prompt: What happens if the young man takes the red pill?
questions.target: He will see how deep the rabbit hole goes
choices: He will wake up at home
He will see how deep the rabbit hole goes

translation: A wise man offered the young man two pills: 'If you take the blue one, this dream remains. If you take the red one, I will show you how deep the rabbit hole goes.'
